---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or documentation capability for the AI in Action roadmap
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What do you want to add or change?

## Problem

What user, learner, or operator problem does this address?

## Proposed approach

How might we solve it? Prefer incremental options.

## Capability impact (if any)

- [ ] Local-first experience
- [ ] Optional sync / accounts
- [ ] Advanced local insights
- [ ] Docs / roadmap only
- [ ] Accessibility / testing / observability

## Education / showcase impact

How does this strengthen the public case study (engineering judgment, architecture, delivery, learning value)?

## Current vs future

Is this **current-state** work or **future vision**? Link related docs if known.

## Non-goals

What should we explicitly not do as part of this request?

## Validation

How would we know this is worth building (feedback, usage, content need)?
